name: Abyssal! Vortex! Cannon!
descriptionTemplate: Dispel {Burn} from all cards in hand. Deal DMG equal to [Arg7]% {Tentacle DMG} Bonus to all enemies, dealing 2× DMG to the enemy with the highest HP. Sacrifice up to 3 additional Permanent Tentacles, each increasing this Exalt's Crit. DMG by +50%.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Dispel {Burn} from all cards in hand. Deal DMG equal to [Arg7]% {Tentacle DMG} Bonus to all enemies, dealing 2× DMG to the enemy with the highest HP. Sacrifice up to 3 extra Permanent Tentacles, each increasing this Exalt's Crit. DMG by +50%. Gain [Arg6] Realm Mastery.

Dispel {Burn} from all cards in hand. Deal DMG equal to [Arg7]% {Tentacle DMG} Bonus to all enemies, dealing 3× DMG to the enemy with the highest HP. Sacrifice up to 3 additional Permanent Tentacles, each increasing this Exalt's Crit. DMG by +50%. Gain [Arg6] Realm Mastery, and for every 20 Aliemus spent, other Awakeners gain 1 Aliemus.
